meta.source: Synthetic cleaned ESP/ecommerce export for Campaign Pulse. Contains raw send/count/revenue facts only; analytics are calculated in the app.
meta.principle: Values that describe what happened live in JSON. Values that interpret what happened are calculated by the interface.

campaigns.name: New Year Reset 25
campaigns.goal: Reactivate and reframe the brand after holiday fatigue.

campaigns.name: Winter Editorial 25
campaigns.goal: Drive content-led engagement before spring commercial activity.

campaigns.name: Spring Launch 25
campaigns.goal: Launch the spring capsule and test exclusivity-led framing.

campaigns.name: Earth Week Edit 25
campaigns.goal: Use sustainability and craft stories to warm mid-intent audiences.

campaigns.name: Private Sale 25
campaigns.goal: Convert high-intent and discount-sensitive segments without overexposing VIPs.

campaigns.name: Summer Drop 25
campaigns.goal: Scale product-drop revenue ahead of summer demand.

campaigns.name: Resort Edit 25
campaigns.goal: Support travel/resort positioning and community event engagement.

campaigns.name: Late Summer Reset 25
campaigns.goal: Recover engagement during lower-attention summer weeks.

campaigns.name: Back to Routine 25
campaigns.goal: Rebuild purchase intent after summer and launch autumn staples.

campaigns.name: Archive Sale 25
campaigns.goal: Clear archive inventory while protecting premium perception.

campaigns.name: Black Friday 25
campaigns.goal: Maximize revenue under heavy send pressure and promo sensitivity.

campaigns.name: Holiday Gifting 25
campaigns.goal: Drive gifting revenue while monitoring fatigue and unsub pressure.

campaigns.name: New Year Reset 26
campaigns.goal: Reactivate and reframe the brand after holiday fatigue.

campaigns.name: Winter Editorial 26
campaigns.goal: Drive content-led engagement before spring commercial activity.

campaigns.name: Spring Launch 26
campaigns.goal: Launch the spring capsule and test exclusivity-led framing.

campaigns.name: Earth Week Edit 26
campaigns.goal: Use sustainability and craft stories to warm mid-intent audiences.

campaigns.name: Private Sale 26
campaigns.goal: Convert high-intent and discount-sensitive segments without overexposing VIPs.

campaigns.name: Summer Drop 26
campaigns.goal: Scale product-drop revenue ahead of summer demand.

campaigns.name: Welcome Series
campaigns.goal: Convert new leads into first purchase through education-led onboarding.

campaigns.name: Winback Engine
campaigns.goal: Reactivate lapsed customers with controlled offer pressure.

campaigns.name: Editorial Letter
campaigns.goal: Maintain brand heat and list health with non-commercial storytelling.

segments.name: VIP Customers
segments.description: High-value customers with repeat purchase behavior.

segments.name: Recent Buyers
segments.description: Customers who purchased in the last 60 days.

segments.name: High-Intent Browsers
segments.description: Visitors with recent product views, cart adds, or wishlist behavior.

segments.name: New Leads
segments.description: New subscribers who have not purchased yet.

segments.name: Lapsed Customers
segments.description: Past buyers with no purchase in 180+ days.

segments.name: Event Attendees
segments.description: Subscribers connected to launches, showrooms, or pop-up events.

segments.name: Discount Seekers
segments.description: Subscribers with high promo sensitivity and lower full-price conversion.
